summary: Excellent audience recording of a classic show with superb sound and timeless performance
review: The transfer is praised as sounding great, earning it the reputation of being one of the best audience recordings out there. Reviewers highlight the show’s classic status and recommend it to anyone who hasn’t heard it yet. Both the musical vibe and the audio fidelity are described in glowing terms.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes both outstanding sound quality and a classic performance, leading to a high rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Transfer described as 'nice sounding' and one of the best audience recordings; clear, well‑balanced, captures live ambience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure, but the show is referred to as a classic performance that flows naturally.
